description: Recurring SaaS subscription invoice with annual billing, partial-month pro-ration, and renewal date
parsed_text:
TAX INVOICE
Invoice #: INV-SaaS-2025-8801
Invoice Date: 2025-07-01   Due Date: 2025-07-15
Vendor: CloudStream Software Inc.
Vendor Tax ID: XX-XXX3391
Vendor Address: 500 Silicon Alley, Suite 1200, New York, NY 10018
Bill To: Bridgestone Analytics Corp.
Accounts Payable, 88 Park Avenue South, New York, NY 10016
Account ID: CSI-BRG-0044
PO Number: None   Terms: Net 15   Currency: USD

Subscription Details:
Product: CloudStream Enterprise Analytics Platform
Plan: Enterprise — Unlimited Users
Billing Cycle: Annual
Subscription Period: 2025-07-01 through 2026-06-30
Renewal Date: 2026-07-01

Line Items:
1. Annual Subscription Fee (Enterprise)                 $28,800.00
   Base rate: $2,400.00/month x 12 months

2. Pro-Ration Adjustment — June 2025 (16 days used)     $1,280.00
   Migrated from Starter plan 2025-06-15
   Daily rate: $80.00/day x 16 days

3. Professional Onboarding Package (one-time)           $1,500.00
   Data migration, configuration, admin training

Subtotal:                                              $31,580.00
Sales Tax (NY 8.875%):                                  $2,802.74
Discount — Annual Prepay (5%):                         ($1,440.00)
Invoice Total:                                         $32,942.74
Amount Due:                                            $32,942.74

Note: Renewal invoice will be automatically issued 30 days before 2026-07-01.
For billing questions: billing@cloudstreamsoftware.com | 212-555-0180
